Title: Congress Disclosure Watchlist Digest - TinyOps Studio

URL Source: https://tinyopsstudio.com/congress-disclosure-watchlist-digest

Markdown Content:
Congress disclosure watchlist

## Track public politician-trade claims from official filings first.

This digest turns the refreshed House PTR scan into a source-first watchlist: ticker clusters, named-member claim status, filing lag, and price-anchor caveats. It is a research verification surface, not a copy-trading product and not investment advice.

Current clusters

## The useful product is the source trail, not hindsight hype.

Rows are official public filing mentions from the current screen. Purchase-like rows still require date, amount, and filing-lag review before public claims are repeated.

26 rows
### NOW

8 named members; 5 purchase-like rows; 14 rows need table review.

10 rows
### CSCO

4 named members; 5 purchase-like rows; 0 rows need table review.

Broad source universe

Price anchors

## Anchor moves are demand signals, not causality.

The public posts create buyer interest because people care about later price moves. TinyOps keeps that separated from the official filing evidence and avoids trade advice.

| Ticker | Anchor close | Latest close | Move note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| CSCO | 2026-04-13 close 82.35 | 2026-05-22 close 120.41 | 46.22%; not causal evidence |
| NOW | 2026-05-21 close 99.69 | 2026-05-22 close 102.13 | 2.45%; not causal evidence |

Filing-lag research

## Tiny sample, filing-date entry, benchmark included.

This snapshot uses the first market close on or after public filing date, not transaction date. It is a research caveat for claim cleanup, not a trading system.

| Ticker | Events | Avg 20d | Avg 20d vs SPY | Avg 60d | Avg 60d vs SPY |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| CSCO | 5 | 20.38% (n=5, partial=0) | 18.28% (n=5, partial=0) | 19.72% (n=2, partial=3) | 16.33% (n=2, partial=3) |
| NOW | 5 | -13.13% (n=2, partial=3) | -16.54% (n=2, partial=3) | n/a (n=0, partial=5) | n/a (n=0, partial=5) |

Boundary

## No investment advice, no copy-trading instructions.

This digest is for verification and citation cleanup. It does not tell anyone to buy, sell, hold, short, copy, or trade securities.

*   No nonpublic information
*   No trade alerts or guaranteed-return claims
*   No Mercury business funds used for speculation
*   Source links before social-media framing
